en: If you crack something you break it But what does someone mean if they tell you to get
ko: 뭔가를 crack하면 깨뜨리는 거야. 그런데 get

en: Dan can you help me with my proposal You mean the one that's due tonight Let me see what you've got
ko: Dan, 제안서 도와줄 수 있어? 오늘 밤까지인 거? 뭘 했는지 보자

en: Well I don't have much Or um anything Are you serious
ko: 음 별로 없어. 아니 음 아무것도 없어. 진심이야?

en: You only have five hours Well then we'd better get cracking
Get cracking is a way of telling someone to do something right away You can also say
ko: get cracking은 지금 당장 뭔가를 하라고 말하는 거야. 자기 자신에 대해서도

en: it about yourself as in I should get cracking on my homework
ko: 쓸 수 있어. 예를 들면 숙제를 어서 시작해야겠다

en: People sometimes drop the full I N G sound and just say get crackin And
ko: I N G 소리를 빼고 get crackin이라고도 해. 이상
